pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py line 93 - document created during task setup
Task description explicitly states 'Set text wrapping to Square' for exterior.jpg; matches standard Microsoft Word wrapping format
Calculated from task description (3 inches) × EMUS_PER_INCH constant (914400) = 2,743,200 EMUs; verified against verifier.py line 33
Task description: 'width to 3 inches' for exterior.jpg; EMU conversion: 2743200 / 914400 = 3.0 inches
Task description specifies Alt Text containing 'Front exterior view' for exterior.jpg
Task description explicitly states 'Set text wrapping to Tight' for interior.jpg; matches standard Microsoft Word wrapping format
Calculated from task description (2.5 inches) × EMUS_PER_INCH constant (914400) = 2,286,000 EMUs; verified against verifier.py line 40
Task description: 'width to 2.5 inches' for interior.jpg; EMU conversion: 2286000 / 914400 = 2.5 inches
Task description specifies Alt Text containing 'Living room interior' for interior.jpg
Task description explicitly states 'Set text wrapping to Top and Bottom' for floorplan.jpg; matches standard Microsoft Word wrapping format
Calculated from task description (5 inches) × EMUS_PER_INCH constant (914400) = 4,572,000 EMUs; verified against verifier.py line 46
Task description: 'width to 5 inches' for floorplan.jpg; EMU conversion: 4572000 / 914400 = 5.0 inches
Task description specifies Alt Text containing 'Floor plan layout' for floorplan.jpg
Task description explicitly states 'center it horizontally' for floorplan.jpg
Verified against verifier.py line 210: width_tolerance = spec['width'] * 0.15 (15% scoring tolerance); also referenced in metadata for all images
Standard Office Open XML (OOXML) specification constant; verified in verifier.py line 26; used for all EMU calculations
Task description specifies exactly 3 images (exterior, interior, floorplan); verifier.py expects 3 images for full points (line 117-118)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires inserting three images into a Word document (PropertyReport.docx) with specific formatting: exterior.jpg (Square wrap, 3 inches/2,743,200 EMUs), interior.jpg (Tight wrap, 2.5 inches/2,286,000 EMUs), and floorplan.jpg (Top and Bottom wrap, 5 inches/4,572,000 EMUs, centered). All EMU values correctly convert to their specified inch dimensions using the standard OOXML constant of 914,400 EMUs per inch. Alt text keywords are 'exterior', 'interior', and 'floor plan' respectively. The 15% tolerance threshold applies to image width verification. All metadata claims are consistent with the task description and verifier implementation.
